leadText: The Looker Tickets (Japanese: ハンサムチケット Handsome Tickets) are Key Items introduced in Generation VI. They are a set of five tickets that Looker tasks the player to find to test them during the Looker Bureau post-game quest.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Collecting the five Looker Tickets that Looker hid throughout Lumiose City will allow the player to progress the storyline.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method X Y Lumiose City Magenta Plaza Pokémon Center (near the dressing room) Prism Tower 1F (west of the elevator) Herboriste (east wall) Hotel Richissime 1F (east wall) Lumiose Museum 1F (east wall, near the couch)

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A ticket that was handmade by Looker. It's decorated with a liberal amount of glittery paint.
